step_by_step_thinking:
The cell-rich zone is primarily associated with areas where active tissue formation or repair occurs, such as in dental pulp. Among the given options, fibroblasts are the most common type of cells found in connective tissues responsible for producing extracellular matrix components like collagen, which supports various structures including those within the dentin-pulp complex.
